headline: Trucordia Welcomes Steve Roberts as Executive Vice President, Health Benefits & Financial Services
summary: Trucordia, a top 20 U.S. insurance brokerage, announced today that Steve Roberts has joined the company as Executive Vice President, Health Benefits & Financial Services. Roberts excels in bringing teams together to deliver scalable, client-focused insurance solutions, and brings more than three decades of experience leading growth, modernization, and large-scale transformation across major healthcare and benefits organizations.
